title: Cobblemon | Better Shiny Mons
description: Don't like some the the shiny textures, or wish that some were better? This (wip) Resource Pack might fix your Problems!
body:
Don't like some the the shiny textures, or wish that some were better? This (wip) Resource Pack might fix your Problems!

Altered Mons include the following:
___
- Venusaur
- Blastoise
- Gastly
- Haunter
- Gengar
- Gabite
- Garchomp
___

More Updates will come in the future. Feel free to suggest any Cobblemon you'd want to see a new shiny for. https://discord.gg/9tzfmhBw
